name: qch-dev-tools
description: Project-specific guidance for developing, validating, balancing, and preparing the QCH game.

interface.shortDescription: QCH guidance for code, assets, QA, balance, and release work.
interface.longDescription: A local project plugin with guidance for navigating the QCH Next.js game, auditing media assets, verifying visual changes, reviewing gameplay balance, and preparing changes for GitHub.
defaultPrompt: Use QCH Codebase to find where this feature belongs.
Use QCH Assets to audit the media library.
Use QCH Release before sending changes to GitHub.
